data.title: XPeng Shares Are Trading Higher: What's Going On?
data.description: XPeng Inc (NYSE:XPEV) shares are trading higher on Monday. The company provided a vehicle delivery update for November over the weekend. Here's a look at what you need to know.

data.title: Fidelity Raises Valuation Of Elon Musk's X, But It Remains 72% Below Buyout Price
data.description: Elon Musk took Twitter private for $44 billion. Fidelity raised the carrying valuation for the social media company in October after many months of markdowns.
